articles.title: Chaos Ransomware Uses msaRAT to Route C2 Traffic Through Headless Chrome and Edge
articles.summary: The Chaos ransomware group ran its command-and-control through the victim's own browser. Cisco Talos on Thursday detailed msaRAT, the Rust implant behind it, found on a compromised Windows machine ahead of the encryptor.
